name: AMD
rationale: Open a small AMD starter. It has the cleanest bullish setup in the feed: strong multi-horizon momentum, plus AMD’s Advancing AI 2026 event is scheduled for July 23, 2026 and Ryzen AI Embedded P100 shipments are starting in July 2026.
